top_signals.title: 70% of companies in Japan have no rules on social media conduct
top_signals.summary: A survey found that most firms leave posts to individual judgment despite concern about information leaks and online conflicts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gen Z craze toy maker Jellycat launches legal action against Next and Hamleys
top_signals.summary: Jellycat, the British soft toy company that took Gen-Z by storm, has filed several legal actions in the London High Court over trademark allegations. Lawyers at Stephenson Harwood filed three separate lawsuits last week against retail giants over passing off and trademark allegations. The firm, founded by Thomas Gatacre in 1999, has an exclusive trademark [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
